sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْفَرِيقُ مَعًا لِتَحْقِيقِ هَدَفٍ مُشْتَرَكٍ.
sentences.translation: Tim radi zajedno kako bi postigao zajednički cilj.
sentences.translationEn: The team works together to achieve a common goal.

sentences.arabic: يَتَبَادَلُ الزُّمَلَاءُ الْأَفْكَارَ وَالْخِبْرَاتِ فِي الِاجْتِمَاعِ الْأُسْبُوعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Kolege razmjenjuju ideje i iskustva na sedmičnom sastanku.
sentences.translationEn: Colleagues exchange ideas and experiences in the weekly meeting.

sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ هُوَ سِرُّ النَّجَاحِ فِي أَيِّ مَشْرُوعٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Saradnja je tajna uspjeha u bilo kojem velikom projektu.
sentences.translationEn: Cooperation is the secret of success in any big project.
